name: Nichirin Co., Ltd.
summary: Nichirin Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive and housing hoses, and related parts worldwide. The company offers brake, air conditioning, and power steering hoses; and automatic transmission fluid, air brake, clutch, ESC, CNG, oil cooler, suspension, urea SCR, hydraulic, and vacuum brake hoses, as well as EF-TUBE and oil cooler units for automotive applications. It also provides brake, clutch, fuel, and oil cushion and cooler hoses for motorcycle applications; and mixing faucet and toilet hoses for residential use. The company was formerly known as Nichirin Rubber Industrial Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Nichirin Co., Ltd. in July 1991. Nichirin Co., Ltd. was founded in 1914 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.
